en: I
Just got here, and I think I'm using signal already hello

en: Sorry, I've got to leave. I have to go. I have to go. I've got to leave. Sorry.
ko: 미안, 나 가야 돼. 가야 해. 가야 해. 나 가야 돼. 미안.

en: Hello, it's me
I was wondering if after all these years you like to meet To go over everything
They say the time's supposed to heal ya
But I ain't done much healing
ko: 시간이 다 치유해 준다고 하지만, 나는 별로 치유되지 않았어.

en: Hello, can you hear me?
I'm in California dreaming about who we used to be
ko: 나는 캘리포니아에서 우리가 예전에 어떤 사이였는지 꿈꾸고 있어.

en: When we were younger and free
I've forgotten how it felt before the world fell at our feet
ko: 세상이 우리 발 아래 펼쳐지기 전에 어떤 느낌이었는지 잊어버렸어.

en: There's such a difference between us and a million miles
ko: 우리 사이에는 큰 차이가 있어, 그리고 백만 마일의 거리가.

en: Hello from the other side
I must have called a thousand times
To tell you I'm sorry
For everything that I've done
But when I call you never seem to be home
ko: 근데 전화하면 넌 항상 집에 없는 것 같아.

en: Hello from the outside
At least I can say that I trying to tell you I sorry for breaking your heart But it don matter it clearly doesn tear you apart anymore
ko: 적어도 노력은 했다고 말할 수 있어. 네 마음을 아프게 해서 미안해. 하지만 상관없어, 이제 분명히 넌 아프지도 않잖아.

en: Hello, how are you?
It's so typical of me to talk about myself
ko: 내 얘기만 하는 거, 나답지 뭐.

en: I'm sorry, I hope that you will
Did you ever make it out of that town where nothing ever happened?
ko: 아무 일도 없던 그 동네에서 결국 나왔어?

en: It's no secret that the both of us are running out of time
ko: 우리 둘 다 시간이 얼마 남지 않았다는 건 비밀도 아니잖아.

en: So hello from the other side
I must have called a thousand times
To tell you I'm sorry
For everything that I've done
But when I call you never seem to be home
ko: 근데 전화하면 넌 항상 집에 없는 것 같아.

en: Hello from the outside
At least I can say that I've tried
ko: 적어도 노력은 했다고 말할 수 있어.
